title: exostema triflorum
intro: Exostema triflorum, also known as the Red Bustillia or Yellow Bignay, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Exostema triflorum are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Exostema triflorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
